rpc_url_note: Prompt specified http://127.0.0.1:4000/api but local node was down (port 4000 closed); funded wallet lives on hosted studionet, so deployed there (same fallback as sibling battery-health).
contract_fix_note: Author contract failed at runtime: DynArray()/TreeMap() were constructed directly (TypeError: this class can't be instantiated by user). Fixed with operator authorization by using TreeMap.get_or_insert_default(...) + in-place storage-proxy mutation instead of direct collection construction and copy-onto-self reassignment.
